subject: Hardening sprint task packets — drift detection, validation enforcement, secure transfer logging
body:
Per verification review recommendations, splitting 3 pending controls into lane-scoped P1 tasks.

All three have core implementations in SwarmMind. The gap is: (1) cross-lane wiring, (2) dual-verification integration per VERIFICATION_LANES.md, (3) evidence of enforcement.

See payload.tasks for the full packet set.

tasks.title: Drift detection — cross-lane baseline + compare
remaining: Create baseline profile from all 4 lanes' trace directories
Run compare against each lane, generate drift reports
Wire drift report output into VERIFICATION_LANES.md Lane R checks

tasks.title: Validation enforcement — dual-verification integration
remaining: Map ConstraintEngine stages to VERIFICATION_LANES.md Lane L (structural) checks
Map verification-domain-gate to Lane R (operational) checks
Implement consensus check function (L result == R result, confidence delta <= 3)
Wire consensus result into lane-worker routing decisions

tasks.title: Secure transfer logging — signed message audit trail
done_in_swarmmind: SchemaValidator.js enforces signature_valid on all messages
lane-worker.js sends NACK on signature mismatch
remaining: Create unified transfer log format (who sent, when, signature hash, delivery status)
Write transfer-log-aggregator that scans all lanes' outbox/processed for audit trail
Verify cross-lane message signing is active (check trust-store.json key coverage)

tasks.title: Re-run verification after each control lands
tasks.note: Archivist to re-run VERIFICATION_TABLE checks after HARDEN-1, HARDEN-2, HARDEN-3 each close. Not all at once — one at a time with evidence.

convergence_gate.claim: 3 pending verification controls decomposed into lane-scoped P1 tasks with owner, evidence path, and due date.
